message:
fix: compute predictive health estimates from actual resource usage (#3714)

Replace hardcoded timeToExhaustion strings and severity levels with
calculated values derived from real resource usage percentages. Add
estimateTimeToExhaustion(), severityFromUsage(), and confidenceFromUsage()
helper functions that use tiered heuristics to project exhaustion timelines
from current utilization data instead of static strings.

Closes #3674

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
